info.title: E-Commerce CRM API
info.description:
High-performance, multi-tenant CRM backend for e-commerce businesses.

## Features
- Customer management with RFM scoring and lifecycle tracking
- Order and product catalog management
- CSV/XLSX import/export with field mapping
- Shopify integration with webhook sync
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Background job processing with BullMQ

## Authentication
All endpoints require Bearer token authentication. Get a token from `/api/auth/sign-in/email`.

## Rate Limits
- Auth endpoints: 10 requests/minute
- API endpoints: 100 requests/minute
- Bulk operations: 20 requests/minute
